GRP-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-ADMINS-KEY.name: grp-lz-prod-oke-admins
GRP-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-ADMINS-KEY.description: Landing Zone Production environment OKE platform cluster management administration access group.

GRP-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-RBAC-ADMIN-KEY.name: grp-lz-prod-oke-rbac-admin
GRP-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-RBAC-ADMIN-KEY.description: Landing Zone Production environment OKE platform Kubernetes RBAC administration access group.

GRP-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-RBAC-VIEWER-KEY.name: grp-lz-prod-oke-rbac-viewer
GRP-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-RBAC-VIEWER-KEY.description: Landing Zone Production environment OKE platform Kubernetes RBAC viewer access group.

PCY-LZ-OKE-SERVICE-PUBLIC-LB-HUB-KEY.name: pcy-lz-oke-service-public-lb-hub
PCY-LZ-OKE-SERVICE-PUBLIC-LB-HUB-KEY.description: Grants OKE cluster resource principals opted-in public Load Balancer, Network Load Balancer, and frontend NSG permissions plus cluster-wide Hub IP permissions in the Landing Zone shared Hub network boundary.
statements: allow any-user to manage load-balancers in compartment cmp-lz-network where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster', request.principal.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-oke.platform = 'prod-oke', any { request.permission = 'LOAD_BALANCER_INSPECT', request.permission = 'LOAD_BALANCER_READ', request.permission = 'LOAD_BALANCER_CREATE', all { request.principal.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-oke.platform = target.resource.tag.tagns-lz-oke.platform, request.permission != 'LOAD_BALANCER_MOVE' } } }

allow any-user to manage network-load-balancers in compartment cmp-lz-network where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster', request.principal.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-oke.platform = 'prod-oke', any { request.permission = 'NETWORK_LOAD_BALANCER_INSPECT', request.permission = 'NETWORK_LOAD_BALANCER_READ', request.permission = 'NETWORK_LOAD_BALANCER_CREATE', all { request.principal.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-oke.platform = target.resource.tag.tagns-lz-oke.platform, request.permission != 'NETWORK_LOAD_BALANCER_MOVE' } } }
allow any-user to use network-security-groups in compartment cmp-lz-network where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster', request.principal.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-oke.platform = 'prod-oke' }
allow any-user to use subnets in compartment cmp-lz-network where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster', request.principal.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-oke.platform = 'prod-oke' }
allow any-user to read vcns in compartment cmp-lz-network where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster', request.principal.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-oke.platform = 'prod-oke' }
allow any-user to manage public-ips in compartment cmp-lz-network where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster' }
allow any-user to use private-ips in compartment cmp-lz-network where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster' }
allow any-user to manage floating-ips in compartment cmp-lz-network where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster' }

PCY-LZ-OKE-SERVICE-TAGGING-KEY.name: pcy-lz-oke-service-tagging
PCY-LZ-OKE-SERVICE-TAGGING-KEY.description: Grants OKE clusters the ability to apply the Landing Zone-owned OKE platform tag to Kubernetes-created Load Balancers and Network Load Balancers in the Landing Zone OKE tag namespace.
statements: allow any-user to use tag-namespaces in tenancy where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster', request.principal.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-oke.platform = '*', target.tag-namespace.name = 'tagns-lz-oke' }

PCY-LZ-PROD-OKE-SERVICE-NETWORK-KEY.name: pcy-lz-prod-oke-service-network
PCY-LZ-PROD-OKE-SERVICE-NETWORK-KEY.description: Grants OKE cluster resource principals scope-allowlisted private Load Balancer, Network Load Balancer, and NSG permissions plus the VCN prerequisites for NSG lifecycle and cluster-wide private-IP use in the prod network compartment.
statements: allow any-user to use private-ips in compartment cmp-lz-prod-network where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster' }

allow any-user to manage network-security-groups in compartment cmp-lz-prod-network where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster', request.principal.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-oke.platform = 'prod-oke', request.permission != 'NETWORK_SECURITY_GROUP_MOVE' }

allow any-user to manage vcns in compartment cmp-lz-prod-network where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster', request.principal.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-oke.platform = 'prod-oke', any { request.operation = 'CreateNetworkSecurityGroup', request.operation = 'DeleteNetworkSecurityGroup' } }
allow any-user to read vcns in compartment cmp-lz-prod-network where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster', request.principal.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-oke.platform = 'prod-oke' }

allow any-user to manage load-balancers in compartment cmp-lz-prod-network where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster', request.principal.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-oke.platform = 'prod-oke', any { request.permission = 'LOAD_BALANCER_INSPECT', request.permission = 'LOAD_BALANCER_READ', request.permission = 'LOAD_BALANCER_CREATE', all { request.principal.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-oke.platform = target.resource.tag.tagns-lz-oke.platform, request.permission != 'LOAD_BALANCER_MOVE' } } }

allow any-user to manage network-load-balancers in compartment cmp-lz-prod-network where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster', request.principal.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-oke.platform = 'prod-oke', any { request.permission = 'NETWORK_LOAD_BALANCER_INSPECT', request.permission = 'NETWORK_LOAD_BALANCER_READ', request.permission = 'NETWORK_LOAD_BALANCER_CREATE', all { request.principal.compartment.tag.tagns-lz-oke.platform = target.resource.tag.tagns-lz-oke.platform, request.permission != 'NETWORK_LOAD_BALANCER_MOVE' } } }

PCY-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-ADMINS-KEY.name: pcy-lz-prod-oke-admins
PCY-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-ADMINS-KEY.description: Grants grp-lz-prod-oke-admins OKE platform administration access in the Production environment OKE platform and network compartments.
statements: allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to read all-resources in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-platform:cmp-lz-prod-oke
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to manage cluster-family in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-platform:cmp-lz-prod-oke
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to manage instance-family in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-platform:cmp-lz-prod-oke
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to use vnics in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-platform:cmp-lz-prod-oke
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to inspect compartments in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-platform:cmp-lz-prod-oke
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to read virtual-network-family in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-network
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to use subnets in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-network
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to use network-security-groups in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-network
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to use vnics in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-network
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to manage private-ips in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-network
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-admins' to use compute-capacity-reservations in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-platform:cmp-lz-prod-oke

PCY-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-RBAC-ROLE-KEY.name: pcy-lz-prod-oke-rbac-roles
PCY-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-RBAC-ROLE-KEY.description: Grants OKE RBAC administrator and viewer groups Kubernetes cluster access in the Production environment OKE platform compartment.
statements: allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-rbac-admin' to use cluster in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-platform:cmp-lz-prod-oke
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-prod-oke-rbac-viewer' to use cluster in compartment cmp-landingzone:cmp-lz-prod:cmp-lz-prod-platform:cmp-lz-prod-oke

PCY-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-SERVICE-COMPUTE.name: pcy-lz-prod-oke-service-compute
PCY-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-SERVICE-COMPUTE.description: Grants OKE service, clusters, and node pools compute and capacity-reservation permissions for OKE-managed resources in the Production environment OKE platform compartment.
statements: allow any-user to manage instances in compartment cmp-lz-prod-oke where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster', request.principal.compartment.id = target.compartment.id }
allow any-user to read instance-images in compartment cmp-lz-prod-oke where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster', request.principal.compartment.id = target.compartment.id }
allow service oke to use compute-capacity-reservations in compartment cmp-lz-prod-oke
allow any-user to use compute-capacity-reservations in compartment cmp-lz-prod-oke where all { request.principal.type = 'nodepool', request.principal.compartment.id = target.compartment.id }

PCY-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-SERVICE-SECURIT.name: pcy-lz-prod-oke-service-security
PCY-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-SERVICE-SECURIT.description: Grants security administrators and the OKE platform resource principals the enabled platform-scoped certificate and CIS2 encryption-key permissions in the Production environment OKE platform compartment.
statements: allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-security-admin' to manage leaf-certificate-family in compartment cmp-lz-prod-oke
allow any-user to manage leaf-certificate-family in compartment cmp-lz-prod-oke where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster' }
allow group 'id_lz_common'/'grp-lz-security-admin' to manage keys in compartment cmp-lz-prod-oke
allow any-user to use keys in compartment cmp-lz-prod-oke where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster', request.principal.compartment.id = target.compartment.id }
allow any-user to use key-delegate in compartment cmp-lz-prod-oke where all { request.principal.type = 'nodepool', request.principal.compartment.id = target.compartment.id }

PCY-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-SERVICE-STORAGE.name: pcy-lz-prod-oke-service-storage
PCY-LZ-PROD-PLATFORM-OKE-SERVICE-STORAGE.description: Grants OKE clusters persistent volume, backup, and file storage permissions in the Production environment OKE platform compartment.
statements: allow any-user to manage volume-backups in compartment cmp-lz-prod-oke where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster', request.principal.compartment.id = target.compartment.id }
allow any-user to use volumes in compartment cmp-lz-prod-oke where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster', request.principal.compartment.id = target.compartment.id }
allow any-user to manage file-family in compartment cmp-lz-prod-oke where all { request.principal.type = 'cluster', request.principal.compartment.id = target.compartment.id }
